0.text: Pleural effusion measuring approximately 2.7 cm at the thickest part of the right hemithorax

1.text: Pleural effusion measuring approximately 1 cm at the thickest part of the left hemithorax

2.text: Near-total atelectasis of the right middle lobe with air bronchograms

6.text: More prominent paraseptal emphysema areas at the apices of both lungs
